zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Hugh de Lusignan XI於1220年12月21日出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche37歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England34歲。他和Yolande of Brittany至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1250年4月8日在埃及享年29歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特拉 庫洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Count Hugh de Lusignan XI was born on 21 December 1220, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, was 37 and his mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Yolande of Brittany. He died on 8 April 1250, in Egypt, at the age of 29, and was buried in La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Hugh de Lusignan XI est né le 21 décembre 1220, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Yolande of Brittany. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1250, à Égypte, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Count Hugh de Lusignan XI am 21. Dezember 1220 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche 37 und seine Mutter Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 34. Er hatte mit Yolande of Brittany mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1250 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Ägypten und wurde in La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Hugh de Lusignan XI è nato il il 21 dicembre 1220 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Yolande of Brittany. Morì il 8 aprile 1250, nel Egitto, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Hugh de Lusignan XIが1220年12月21日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marcheは37歳，母Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandは34歳であった。彼はYolande of Brittanyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1250年4月8日にエジプトで29歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントラ コウロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Hugh de Lusignan XI(이)가 1220년 12월 21일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Yolande of Brittany(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 4월 8일 이집트에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 라 쿠론에 묻혔다.

pt.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Hugh de Lusignan XI nasceu em 21 de dezembro de 1220, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Yolande of Brittany. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1250, em Egipto, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Hugh de Lusignan XI родился 21 декабря 1220 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Yolande of Brittany. Он умер 8 апреля 1250 г. в местности Египет в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности ла коуронн, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Yolande of Brittany. Murió el 8 de abril de 1250, en Egipto, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
